## Linked issue

Closes #

## What changed

A short description of the change and the reasoning behind it.

## How it was tested

- [ ] `make check` passes (ruff + mypy)
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] Manually verified the behavior

## Screenshots

For UI changes, include before/after screenshots.

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] No new top-level dependencies (or justified above)
- [ ] CLA signed (the bot will prompt on first PR)
